data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding usage limits.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for usage limits (total redemptions, per customer). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of these usage limits. The linked use case mentions the need for usage limits but lacks the necessary details to assert their implementation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of usage limits (total redemptions, per customer).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for usage limits.
